name: openclaw-gui
description: OpenClaw cross-platform GUI assistant for pnpm-based install and upgrade

scripts.test: node --test src/__tests__/config.test.js src/__tests__/platform.test.js src/__tests__/logger.test.js src/__tests__/registry.test.js src/__tests__/runtime.test.js
scripts.build:win: tauri build --bundles nsis && node scripts/collect-artifacts.js win
scripts.build:mac: tauri build --bundles dmg && node scripts/collect-artifacts.js mac
scripts.build:linux: tauri build --bundles appimage && node scripts/collect-artifacts.js linux
scripts.build:all: npm run build:win && npm run build:mac && npm run build:linux
